use_when: Use for records concerning African countries, territories, or Africa as a diplomatic region.
do_not_use_when: Do not use only because a country has African diaspora relevance.
example_original_terms: アフリカ;アフリカ諸国;Africa;African countries
notes: Includes North Africa when the source frames the area as Africa.

use_when: Use when records specifically concern Egypt, Libya, Tunisia, Algeria, Morocco, or North Africa as a subregion.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Middle East framing unless North Africa is also explicit.

use_when: Use when records distinguish sub-Saharan Africa from North Africa.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Africa records automatically.
notes: Historical Japanese terms may require caution.

scope_note: Middle Eastern region including West Asia and sometimes Egypt.
use_when: Use for ??, ???, ?????, Middle East, or Near East.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Muslim-majority countries automatically.
notes: Egypt may be both MIDEAST and AFRICA depending context.

scope_note: Asia as a broad diplomatic region.
use_when: Use for broad Asia-related records or Asian countries collectively.
do_not_use_when: Do not use when a narrower region is clearly better alone.
notes: Often combined with AFRICA for Afro-Asian conference records.

scope_note: East Asian countries and political entities.
use_when: Use for China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Mongolia when regionally framed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because PRC appears if the record is global or UN-centered.
notes: Far East may map here, but preserve original term separately.

scope_note: Southeast Asian countries and regional diplomacy.
use_when: Use for Indonesia, Burma/Myanmar, Cambodia, Laos, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, etc.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Asian-African Conference records unless Southeast Asia is specifically relevant.
notes: Bandung host context may justify SOUTHEAST_ASIA.

scope_note: South Asian countries and regional diplomacy.
use_when: Use for India, Pakistan, Ceylon/Sri Lanka, Nepal, Afghanistan when regionally framed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Middle East or Southeast Asia records.

use_when: Use for records explicitly concerning Asia-Pacific or Pacific-facing diplomacy.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Asia records.
notes: Useful for overseas mission chiefs meetings and military/security records.

use_when: Use for records concerning European states or Europe as a region.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for USSR automatically unless European framing is explicit.
notes: France and UK may be entities without EUROPE if region is not central.

scope_note: Latin American countries and regional diplomacy.
use_when: Use for Central America, South America, Caribbean, and Latin American diplomatic attitudes.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Spain/Portugal or Latin Europe.
notes: Useful for China representation voting and country-attitude files.

use_when: Use for Caribbean island states and territories.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Latin America records.

scope_note: Cold War Afro-Asian political and diplomatic space.
use_when: Use for Bandung, Asian-African Conference, AAPSO, Afro-Asian solidarity, and Asia-Africa diplomatic framing.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because a record mentions one Asian and one African country without Afro-Asian framing.
notes: A geopolitical/diplomatic region rather than a physical region.

use_when: Use when the record covers many regions or world opinion without regional focus.
do_not_use_when: Do not use if specific regions are identifiable and sufficient.
